_notes: Parameters are sourced from GitHub main branch and may differ from the version currently deployed in this workspace (e.g. A.4 Data Element and A.6 Incidence have been updated since deployment).

pipelines.name: A.1 DHIS2 Extract
pipelines.description: Extracts DHIS2 pyramid, routine analytics, population, shapes, and reporting rates based on a defined period.

parameters.label: DHIS2 connection
parameters.help: DHIS2 instance to extract data from.

parameters.label: Period (start)
parameters.help: Start of DHIS2 period in YYYYMM format.

parameters.label: Period (end)
parameters.help: End of DHIS2 period in YYYYMM format.

parameters.label: Overwrite
parameters.help: Overwrite existing files in the output dataset.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository before execution.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: Skip all data extraction steps and only execute the reporting notebook.

pipelines.name: A.2 DHIS2 Formatting
pipelines.description: Processes and formats DHIS2 data extracts for the SNT workflow.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository.

pipelines.name: A.3.1 DHIS2 Outlier Detection and Imputation (Magic Glasses)
pipelines.description: Outlier detection and imputation using the Magic Glasses (MAD-based) method.

parameters.label: Detection mode
parameters.help: Partial: fast (~7 min, MAD15 then MAD10). Complete: Partial + seasonal detection, can take several hours.

parameters.label: Push to Shiny database
parameters.help: Send the outliers table to the database for the Shiny app.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: Run only the reporting notebook (no recomputation).

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository before running.

pipelines.name: A.3.1 DHIS2 Outlier Detection and Imputation (Mean)
pipelines.description: Outlier detection and imputation using the mean ± k×SD method.

parameters.label: Number of SD around the mean
parameters.help: Number of standard deviations around the mean (default is 3).

parameters.label: Push outliers table to DB
parameters.help: Push outliers table to DB.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository.

pipelines.name: A.3.1 DHIS2 Outlier Detection and Imputation (Median)
pipelines.description: Outlier detection and imputation using the median ± k×MAD method.

parameters.label: Number of MAD around the median
parameters.help: Number of MAD around the median (default is 3).

parameters.label: Push outliers table to DB
parameters.help: Push outliers table to DB.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository.

pipelines.name: A.4 DHIS2 Reporting Rate (Data Element)
pipelines.description: Calculates facility reporting rates by data element based on routine data.

parameters.label: Routine data source
parameters.help: Select which routine data to use. 'raw' loads formatted routine data, 'imputed' loads outliers-imputed routine data, 'outliers_removed' loads routine data with outliers removed.

parameters.label: Facility Activity indicators
parameters.help: Define which data elements will be used to determine the activity of a facility.

parameters.label: Volume activity indicators
parameters.help: Define which data elements will be used to determine the volume of activity at a facility.

parameters.label: Denominator method
parameters.help: How to calculate the total number of facilities expected to report.

parameters.label: Use weighted reporting rates
parameters.help: If checked, weighted rates populate the REPORTING_RATE column; otherwise unweighted rates are used.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull notebooks from repository
parameters.help: Pull the latest notebooks from the GitHub repository.

pipelines.name: A.4 DHIS2 Reporting Rate (Dataset)
pipelines.description: Calculates reporting rates using DHIS2 dataset-level reporting rate indicators.

parameters.label: Routine data source
parameters.help: Select which routine data to use.

parameters.label: Run reporting notebook only
parameters.help: This will execute only the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull notebooks from repository
parameters.help: Pull the latest notebooks from the GitHub repository.

pipelines.name: A.5 DHIS2 Population Transformation
pipelines.description: Processes DHIS2 population data: scaling, projections, and disaggregation by demographic group.

parameters.label: Part 1: Population reference
parameters.help: Total population for scaling DHIS2 data proportionally.

parameters.label: Part 1: Population year reference
parameters.help: Year matching the population reference.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population under 5
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged under 5.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population pregnant women
parameters.help: Proportion of pregnant women population.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population 0-1 years
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged 0-1.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population 1-2 years
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged 1-2.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population 5-10 years
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged 5-10.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population 5-36 months
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged 5-36 months.

parameters.label: Part 2: Use disaggregation proportions (.csv)
parameters.help: User-uploaded file with population disaggregations at ADM2 level.

parameters.label: Part 3: Projection growth rate
parameters.help: Annual growth rate for projecting population figures.

parameters.label: Part 3: Projection reference year
parameters.help: Base year for population projections.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: Execute only the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Fetch latest scripts from repository.

pipelines.name: A.6 DHIS2 Incidence
pipelines.description: Calculates monthly malaria case metrics and yearly incidence rates from routine HMIS data, adjusting for incomplete testing, reporting, and careseeking.

parameters.label: Method for N1 calculations
parameters.help: Calculate N1 using PRES or SUSP-TEST.

parameters.label: Routine data to use
parameters.help: Which routine data to use: 'raw', 'raw_without_outliers', or 'imputed'.

parameters.label: Use Transformed Population Data
parameters.help: Use population from the A.5 Population Transformation pipeline (enabled) or A.2 Formatting (disabled).

parameters.label: Analyze by Population Group (only if available)
parameters.help: Select population group for disaggregated incidence computation.

parameters.label: Care seeking behaviour (CSB) data file (.csv)
parameters.help: Path to CSB data file. Falls back to DHS data if not provided.

parameters.label: Run Report only
parameters.help: Execute only the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull notebooks from repository
parameters.help: Fetch latest notebooks from GitHub repository.

pipelines.name: A.7 DHIS2 Seasonality - Cases
pipelines.description: SNT-specific pipeline for cases seasonality computation using DHIS2 data.

pipelines.name: B.1 WorldPop Extract
pipelines.description: Extracts WorldPop population raster data for the workspace country.

parameters.label: Overwrite
parameters.help: Overwrite existing population files.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository.

parameters.label: Year
parameters.help: Year of population data to extract from WorldPop.

pipelines.name: B.2 MAP Extracts
pipelines.description: Extracts raster data from the Malaria Atlas Project (MAP) and computes zonal statistics.

parameters.label: Population raster selection (.tif)
parameters.help: Select the population raster (.tif) used for population-weighted calculations.

parameters.label: Target Year
parameters.help: Target year for indicator selection (e.g. 2022). Defaults to latest if unavailable or not specified.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository.

pipelines.name: B.3 Access to Healthcare
pipelines.description: Computes access to healthcare metrics based on facility locations, population, and catchment areas.

parameters.label: FOSA location file (.csv)
parameters.help: If not provided, the DHIS2 pyramid metadata file will be used.

parameters.label: Radius around FOSA (meters)
parameters.help: Catchment radius in meters.

parameters.label: Population raster file (.tif)
parameters.help: If not provided, the default WorldPop raster will be used.

parameters.label: Shapes file (.geojson)
parameters.help: If not provided, the default HMIS/NMDR shapes file will be used.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository.

pipelines.name: D.1 ERA5 Climate Data
pipelines.description: Extracts ERA5 climate data from the Copernicus Climate Data Store for the workspace country.

parameters.label: Start date
parameters.help: Start date of extraction period.

parameters.label: End date
parameters.help: End date of extraction period. Latest available by default.

parameters.label: Climate data store
parameters.help: Credentials for connection to the Copernicus Climate Data Store.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

pipelines.name: D.2 ERA5 Seasonality - Rainfall
pipelines.description: Computes rainfall seasonality metrics from ERA5 climate data.

parameters.label: Minimum number of months per block
parameters.help: Minimum duration of the seasonal block (in months).

parameters.label: Maximum number of months per block
parameters.help: Maximum duration of the seasonal block (in months).

parameters.label: Minimal proportion of rainfall for seasonality
parameters.help: The proportion of annual rainfall that must fall within the block.

parameters.label: Minimal proportion of seasonal years
parameters.help: The proportion of years that must be classified as seasonal.

parameters.label: Use calendar year as denominator
parameters.help: Method to define 'annual' rainfall for the denominator.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: Skip calculations and only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository before execution.
